arts.ttl: Thomas Frank blown away by Liverpool man as behind-the-scenes footage from Brentford emerges
arts.sum: Thomas Frank was discussing Liverpool's 2-0 win over Brentford in their match analysis

arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven boss Peter Bosz SLAMS his own players for 'disrespecting' Liverpool during their 3-2 Champions League win
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven manager Peter Bosz gave a scathing public rebuke to his players for their 'disrespectful' actions against Liverpool .

arts.ttl: 'It was a bit obvious' - Cody Gakpo makes honest Liverpool admission after 'beautiful' moment
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo has reacted to the reception he received during Liverpool's 3-2 loss to PSV Eindhoven

arts.ttl: Can Bournemouth complete quadruple by beating Liverpool?
arts.sum: Bournemouth are enjoying their best ever spell in top-flight football, and they approach Matchweek 24 having already beaten three of the current top four teams at home this season. Like many of Liverpool’s opponents this season, Bournemouth should also be expected to target Slot’s right flank.

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Bournemouth: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Premier League
arts.sum: Arne Slot expected to restore big hitters as Reds face difficult trip to south coast

arts.ttl: Saudi Royal Family want 'privilege' of signing Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Salah has just five months remaining on his contract with Liverpool, and while talks over a new deal don't appear to be moving, the Saudi Pro League is. It's not clear if the Prince was speaking about signing Salah on a free transfer in the summer or making a shock move for the Egyptian international in January.

arts.ttl: Johan Bakayoko makes strong Liverpool transfer claim and responds to Peter Bosz criticism
arts.sum: Johan Bakayoko was on the scoresheet for PSV Eindhoven in their 3-2 Champions League victory over Liverpool

arts.ttl: Arne Slot can't say name of new Liverpool threat as squad decision becomes clear
arts.sum: Liverpool are now preparing for four games in 12 days that will shape the remainder of their domestic campaign

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans accuse Piers Morgan of 'stirring the pot' in Mo Salah's transfer saga
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah continues to be linked with a sensational move to Saudi Arabia and in an interview with Piers Morgan, chiefs have confirmed that they are still plotting a move

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Liverpool: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Cherries out to make statement against Premier League leaders
